scripts.deploy:dev:us-east-1: sh dockerLogin.sh; docker-compose run -e STAGE=dev -e REGION=us-east-1 deploy
scripts.deploy:preprod:eu-west-3: sh dockerLogin.sh; docker-compose run -e STAGE=preprod -e REGION=eu-west-3 deploy
scripts.deploy:prod:us-east-1: sh dockerLogin.sh; docker-compose run -e STAGE=prod -e REGION=us-east-1 deploy
scripts.deploy:prod:eu-west-3: sh dockerLogin.sh; docker-compose run -e STAGE=prod -e REGION=eu-west-3 deploy
